channel.title: Posts on smraisul03

item.title: onebag
item.description:
What is onebag?

When it comes to the idea of onebag, the very thing that inspired me directly is Jeremey Maluf, and his post specifically on the onebag that inspired me to create this post.

Backpack

At the heart of it all, my backpack of choice is the 5.11 Covert 24. I chose this backpack specifically over the other due to it simple design as well as the name being implied, “covert”. In other words, this backpack is chosen for

item.title: stoicism
item.description:
Stoicism

Until we have begun to go without them, we fail to realize how unnecessary many things are. We’ve been using them not because we needed them but because we had them. - Seneca

One of the most profound thing that I can remember from my childhood was when I must’ve been around 6-7 years old. There was one scenario where I could vaguely remember something being taken away from me, and I reacted poorly to that scenario. It wasn’t until many years later when I was first going into anxiety at 17 years old, just as the COVID-19 pandemic hits, and I was faced with the ultimate truth that I needed to grow up, and fast.
